description: Negative fixture: injects a README that still promises "the socket never drops" and "no query loss". Expects DOCUMENTATION NOT READY: ABSOLUTE_CLAIM.
readmeBody:
# MySQL Azure Auth

A community-maintained VS Code preview for browsing and querying Azure Database for MySQL Flexible Server with Microsoft Entra authentication.

The rotation is fault tolerant so the socket never drops. With the drain-and-replace path there is no query loss.
